title: Hyperboloid Renderer
description: A graphics program originally written in C for CS1, recreated in JavaScript using the HTML5 Canvas API to animate a rotating 3D hyperboloid with glowing line art.

title: Network Packet Analyzer
description: A command-line tool that captures and inspects live network traffic, parsing TCP/IP headers and flagging suspicious patterns for educational security analysis.

title: AI Text Classifier
description: A machine learning pipeline that fine-tunes a pre-trained language model to classify text into categories with a simple web interface for live inference.

title: Portfolio Site
description: This portfolio — a hand-coded static site with a matrix boot loader, animated hyperboloid, dynamic JSON-driven project cards, and a dark terminal aesthetic.

title: CTF Challenge Writeups
description: A collection of write-ups from Capture the Flag competitions covering web exploitation, reverse engineering, and cryptography challenges.

title: Sentiment Dashboard
description: A real-time dashboard that pulls tweets via the Twitter API, runs sentiment analysis, and visualises trends with interactive charts.
